news.t: AllianzIM Expands Buffer Allocation ETF Suite with Launch of Buffer15 Uncapped ETF

overview.description: The AllianzIM Buffer15 Uncapped Allocation ETF (SPBU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in enhanced growth alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that holds a laddered portfolio of 12 AllianzIM Buffer15 Uncapped ETFs. SPBU was launched on Mar 5, 2025 and is issued by Allianz.

data.title: AllianzIM Expands Buffer Allocation ETF Suite with Launch of Buffer15 Uncapped ETF
data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Allianz Investment Management LLC (AllianzIM), a subsidiary of Allianz Life Insurance Company of North America (Allianz Life), today announces the launch of the AllianzIM...
